name: auto-tab-grouper
description: Automatically groups tabs by domain using simple rules

scripts.cleanup: cd dist && find . -name '*.map' -delete && find . -name '*.d.ts' -delete && find . -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete && rm -rf background popup options shared && cd .. && echo '✓ Cleanup complete'
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run cleanup && cd dist && zip -r ../auto-tab-grouper-alpha.zip . && cd .. && echo '✓ Package created: auto-tab-grouper-alpha.zip'
scripts.package:release: npm run build && npm run cleanup && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && cd dist && zip -r ../auto-tab-grouper-v$VERSION.zip . && cd .. && echo '✓ Release package created: auto-tab-grouper-v'$VERSION'.zip'
scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json')); m.version=process.env.npm_package_version; fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(m, null, 2)+'\n');" && git add manifest.json
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m 'release: v%s' && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m 'release: v%s' && git push --follow-tags
